subject: (no subject)
body:
ceos challenge, subject matter experts. please provide us with a whwtie papaer  , Your information is consiatnatly incomploete and misleading. though the acoasta letter says still have some burdenb to prove they were victims the sloman letter says only if they choose to go to trial.  the first four bullet points were presented and you quote the 2255 language.  with a declination not a deferral.  this puts me in the unusal positon of paying girls, then potetnaily being preosecetued, being found innocent and the girls having already received their money as vitims.  Lanna said there are no victims here.. only prosttiutes.. sex tourism to a state where there are 16 year olds, wouldn't it have to be every state. travel to new york , where the solicitation would be a misdeamor, would then be a five year mi mand.. . HE says no one rasied objection to the 2255,, this is simply not true. , at the roy black meeting we came back and said only 12 girls.. as the ones
 inwe were told were in the indictment.  raising the objection to a list that included more than the indictment. Bert  ocariz and the misleading email..l violation of 1591 procedure, lawyers subponea , no depos by state.2422 we were told .. no transmittting, no laundering , 12 year old allegation, history, obnscec acall, misprison of a feloiny child privacy, warrant ,, 40 minors guardian.. judge jordan. THe process was unehtical inconstitutional . not the agreement.  Saige transcripts alex , ahsly. recarey top ten. unethical relases of police reports, sald fork video, target letters,   we should take depos,, felicia esposito, lanna says ALex Hall only interstedin money.. Conaalyy paragraph,, no contact since. inaacurate, deos that concede conatact before,,, the quotation of the 22555, language leaves out the minimum, Baratry. Peteite policey made it;s way in an dout of the agreemtn... demanding that Epsteihn himself go tot the gov;t.. they have never
 shared onfo ewith the ste.
